page_metadata.biotools__summary:
a new approach to dropout imputation and batch effects correction for single-cell RNA-seq data.

Please run Rscript --vanilla fitSCRIBE.R [expression file] [batch index file] [biological group index file] [output file]

a new approach to dropout imputation and batch effects correction for single-cell RNA-seq data.
